_note: PHASE 1 LIVE: the production model - ONE deployed unified BoundAsset verifier referenced by every bound cell, per-transfer proof in the WITNESS, certified tx-set root read from a light-client CHECKPOINT cell (cellDep, data='LCKP'||root). A real genesis (bind) AND a real transition (consume old bound cell -> create new) ran on the live CKB Pudge node, each verifying real Mithril-certified Cardano data in-script. This supersedes the embedded-proof demo (bound-cell-instance.json), which made each step look like a ~45k-CKB code cell.

unified_verifier.note: deployed ONCE, reclaimable, shared by every bound cell as a cellDep; reclaimed the prior demo code cell 0x9eb56c3b to fund it

genesis.in_script_verified: MKMapProof: seal-mint tx 83dd51d2 is in certified tx-set root 30a3465e (range 4355250-4355265); commitment(SealDatum) == blake2b256(state). Proof rode in witness input_type (1136 bytes); root from the checkpoint cellDep.

transition.in_script_verified: consumed the genesis bound cell (GroupInput); MKMapProof: transfer tx a98b6636 is in certified tx-set root 5acd33ab (range 4355295-4355310); the certified transfer consumed the OLD seal (83dd51d2:0); commitment(new SealDatum) == blake2b256(new state). Proof rode in witness input_type (1173 bytes).

leapout_finalize_phase3.finalize_verify_proven_in_ckb_vm: 205,581 cycles on the REAL certified Unbind (MKMapProof in cert root + old seal consumed + seal NOT recreated at binding_lock). See spike/phase3/finalize_bench.rs.
leapout_finalize_phase3.final_spend_status: gas-dust-blocked on testnet (every isomorphic cell is at min capacity; the unbind-checkpoint tx is ~0.02 CKB short and the only free capacity is in unrelated committee-bridge code cells). The verification is proven in-VM on the real certified Unbind.

what_this_proves: The per-transfer production model end-to-end on a public testnet: a single shared verifier, proof-in-witness, checkpoint-cell root - a real state transition that DESTROYS the old bound cell and creates the next, plus the leap-out FINALIZE (destroy on unbind), all gated by in-script verification of real Mithril certification. Not create-only. ~0.05 CKB/transfer (size-based) + a refundable ~149 CKB cell deposit. Relayer (relayer/) is liveness-only and cannot forge.
